board_brief: UPS-backed critical-loads sub-DB (DB-UPS) for a generic IEC commercial 3-storey office. 50A TPN intake fed from MSB-MAIN F07 (50A MCB Type C, 40m feeder) → 10 kVA online double-conversion UPS → DB-UPS (UPS-output side). 30-min ride-through autonomy per IEC 62040-1:2017. 6 circuits: 6 kVA server rack + 2 critical-workstation rings (admin + clinical) + lab benches + BMS controller/alarm panel + UPS bypass loop. Located in ground-floor server/UPS room.

standards_stack.ups_standard: IEC 62040-1:2017 (UPS general and safety requirements — including §5.2.4 bypass design and Annex E fault current contribution on UPS-output side)
standards_stack.it_load_rcd_standard: IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 (Type B RCD selection for IT/server loads with DC leakage components)
standards_stack.shock_protection_standard: IEC 60364-4-41 §411.3.3 (30 mA RCD on socket circuits ≤32A for additional protection)
standards_stack.critical_power_practice: IEEE 446-1995 (Emerald Book — recommended practice for emergency and standby power systems for industrial and commercial applications)

supply.fed_from: MSB-MAIN F07 50A MCB Type C → 10 kVA online double-conversion UPS → DB-UPS (UPS-output side)
supply.system_type: TN-S (utility transformer earthed; building distribution TN-S; UPS output bonded to building TN-S earth)
